Name: WEAPON_ACTION_CATEGORY_PARAM
Description: Defines weapon action animation mappings for different combat contexts, including stance (1H/2H/dual), attack type, and special situations such as rolling, jumping, and guard interactions.

Fields.Name: 1H Normal Attack 1st
Fields.Description: Animation ID for the first light attack in one-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 1H Normal Attack 2nd
Fields.Description: Animation ID for the second light attack in one-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 1H Strong Attack 1st
Fields.Description: Animation ID for the first heavy attack in one-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 1H Strong Attack 2nd
Fields.Description: Animation ID for the second heavy attack in one-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 1H Dash Attack
Fields.Description: Animation ID for a dash attack while in one-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 1H Rolling Attack
Fields.Description: Animation ID for a rolling attack in one-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 1H Step Attack
Fields.Description: Animation ID for a step attack in one-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 1H Downed Attack
Fields.Description: Animation ID used when attacking while downed in one-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 1H Falling Attack
Fields.Description: Animation ID for attacking while falling in one-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 1H Jump Attack
Fields.Description: Animation ID for jumping attack in one-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 2H Normal Attack 1st
Fields.Description: Animation ID for first light attack in two-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 2H Normal Attack 2nd
Fields.Description: Animation ID for second light attack in two-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 2H Strong Attack 1st
Fields.Description: Animation ID for first heavy attack in two-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 2H Strong Attack 2nd
Fields.Description: Animation ID for second heavy attack in two-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 2H Dash Attack
Fields.Description: Animation ID for dash attack in two-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 2H Rolling Attack
Fields.Description: Animation ID for rolling attack in two-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 2H Step Attack
Fields.Description: Animation ID for step attack in two-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 2H Downed Attack
Fields.Description: Animation ID for attacking while downed in two-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 2H Falling Attack
Fields.Description: Animation ID for attacking while falling in two-handed stance.

Fields.Name: 2H Jump Attack
Fields.Description: Animation ID for jumping attack in two-handed stance.

Fields.Name: Dual 1H Normal Attack 2nd
Fields.Description: Second light attack animation in dual-wield one-handed mode.

Fields.Description: Attack while downed in dual-wield one-handed mode.

Fields.Name: Dual 1H Jump Attack

Fields.Name: Parry Break Stab
Fields.Description: Stab animation used after breaking an enemy parry guard.

Fields.Name: Guard Break Stab
Fields.Description: Stab animation used after breaking an enemy guard.

Fields.Name: Backstab
Fields.Description: Backstab execution animation.
